title: MasEnchantments
description: Enchantments that I ported from my Minecraft Server
body:
![masenchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb1a4731fc8697d543864d73b2cc9f76c46dbcd.png)

# MasEnchantments

MasEnchantments is a plugin for PaperMC servers that add custom enchantments to the game to make the game more fun!

This plugin is directly ported from my Minecraft server so anyone can use the plugin for their own server

## Current Available Enchantments


<details>
<summary>Multimine</summary>

Allows you to multi break blocks in a 3 x 3 x 3 radius

Levels:

1 - 3 x 3 x 3

2 - 5 x 5 x 5

3 - 7 x 7 x 7

This enchantment can also scale if you manually add the enchantment in a /give command

</details>

<details>
<summary>MultiXP</summary>

Gives you more XP when you mine ores

Can enchant: Pickaxes

Levels:

1 - +3xp

2 - +4xp

3 - +5xp

This enchantment can also scale if you manually add the enchantment in a /give command

This enchantment also works with Multimine

</details>

<details>
<summary>Magnet</summary>

Increases the range if item pickup

Can enchant: Boots

Levels:

1 - +2 blocks

2 - +6 blocks

3 - +8 blocks

This enchantment can also scale if you manually add the enchantment in a /give command

</details>

More enchantments are coming soon!
